summary: Comprehensive testing of Tag Manager and Template/Call features with from_number parameter. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test data during API tests with TEST_ prefix (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tag editing and template/call features with from_number are working correctly. Backend APIs properly handle from_number parameter for templates and calls.

features_tested.tag_editing_client_profile: PASS - Edit button toggles tag editor, click tags to add/remove, 'Tag updated' toast shows
features_tested.tag_editing_inbox_contacts: PASS - Tag icon button opens editor in conversation header, click tags to add/remove
features_tested.quick_template_sending: PASS - Quick Templates section visible, 'Sending from' indicator shows current number, template dialog shows from_number
features_tested.template_variable_substitution: PASS - {client_name} and {client_balance} properly substituted in preview and sent message
features_tested.call_initiation: PASS - Call button initiates call, shows 'Configure Twilio Voice' info (expected - Twilio is MOCKED)
features_tested.conversation_chains: PASS - Default Number chain shows message count, + New chain option available
features_tested.backend_tag_apis: PASS - GET /api/clients/tags returns all available tags, PUT /api/clients/{id} updates tags correctly

mocked_apis_note: SMS sending and Voice calling are MOCKED (pending Twilio integration). Template sending stores messages but doesn't actually send SMS.
